job_description: Build predictive models using Python, pandas, scikit-learn, and SQL. Experience with feature engineering, A/B testing, and data visualization using Plotly or Tableau. Strong statistics and communication skills required.

Design and deploy machine learning systems with Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and MLOps tools. Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. Work closely with data scientists to productionize models.
Analyze business data using SQL, Excel, and Power BI. Create dashboards, define KPIs, and collaborate with stakeholders to deliver insights. Strong attention to detail and analytical thinking needed.
Develop scalable backend services with Java or Python, REST APIs, microservices, and cloud platforms (AWS/Azure). Experience with Git, CI/CD, and unit testing. Strong problem solving skills required.
Research and prototype NLP and deep learning models using PyTorch, Transformers, and Hugging Face. Publish findings, run experiments, and collaborate with cross functional teams.
Build NLP pipelines for text classification, entity extraction, and search. Strong Python, spaCy, and scikit-learn skills. Experience deploying models via APIs and monitoring performance.
Gather requirements, map processes, and translate business needs into analytical solutions. Use SQL, Excel, and presentation skills to communicate insights to stakeholders.
